1. SAFE BEARING CAPACITY CONSIDERED IS 100 T/M� AS PER GEOTECHNICAL CONSULTANT'S REPORT. 2. IF THE FOUNDING STRATA IS SHALLOWER OR DEEPER THAN THE MINIMUM SPECIFIED, SAME SHOULD BE BROUGHT TO THE NOTICE OF GEOTECHNICAL CONSULTANT AND STRUCTURAL CONSULTANT. 3. FOUNDING STRATA SHOULD BE CHECKED AND APPROVED BY THE GEOTECHNICAL CONSULTANT BEFORE LAYING FOUNDATION. 4. FOR EXCAVATION AND FOUNDATION REFER GUIDELINE NOTES IN GENERAL DETAIL. 5. FOR FOUNDATION EXCAVATION SLOPE SHOULD BE MAINTAIN 1:1. IF 1:1 SLOPE IS NOT POSSIBLE THEN IT SHOULD BE GET INTO OBSERVATION OF GEOTECHNICAL CONSULTANT BEFORE STARTING THE EXCAVATIONS. 6. COVER FOR FOOTING = 75MM. 7. EXCAVATION POCKETS ON WHICH STRUCTURAL MEMBERS SUCH AS RAFT / FOOTING / OR ANY STRUCTURAL STITCHED RAFTS REST SHOULD BE FILLED UP WITH PCC / PLUM CONCRETE. 8. EXCAVATION SLOPE OF LEVEL DIFFERENCES WHERE FOOTINGS / RAFT / STITCHED RAFTS REST SHOULD BE APPROVED BY SOIL CONSULTANTS. 9. WATER LEVEL NEED TO BE CONFIRMED FROM GEOTECHNICAL CONSULTANT AS PER SITE CONDITION. 10. LEVEL DIFFERENCE BETWEEN FOOTINGS SHOULD BE AS PER GENERAL DETAIL. 11. LAPS IF PROVIDED SHOULD BE STAGGERED OTHERWISE TAKE LAP LENGTH 1.4 x Ld. 12. CASTING OF RETAINING WALL MUST BE DONE FOR A 15m. STRETCH (MAX.), AFTER WHICH THERE SHOULD BE A 1m. GAP. THIS GAP SHOULD ONLY BE CAST AFTER 28 DAYS. THIS GAP IS TO REDUCE SHRINKAGE CRACKS WHICH MAY LEAD TO WATER PERCOLATION THROUGH WALL. 13. WATERPROOFING CONSULTANT SHOULD BE REFERRED TO FOR WATERPROOFING DETAILS OF RAFT AND BASEMENT RETAINING WALL.

PROVISION :- LOWER GROUND + GROUND + PD1 TO PD6 + ECO DECK + TERRACE + ROOF NOTES: 1 READ THIS DRAWING WITH RELEVANT ARCHITECTURAL DRAWINGS 2) IN CASE OF ANY DISCREPANCY KINDLY CONTACT THE DESIGN ENGINEER. 3) REINFORCEMENT GRADE : FE500 : T8 & T10 FE550D : T12 & ABOVE 4) CONCRETE GRADE RETAINING WALL: M40 FOOTING: M30 (ONE GRADE HIGHER TO BE POURED THAN MENTIONED ABOVE) 5) COVER : RETAINING WALLS : 50MM FOOTING : 75MM 6) Ldt : 40DIA (FOR M40 - RETAINING WALLS) 50DIA (FOR M30 - FOUNDATION) 7) REFER GENERAL DETAIL NOTES & DRAWINGS 8) SAFE BEARING CAPACITY IS 100T/M2
